name: hedera-skills
description: Official Hedera marketplace for AI coding agent plugins - Agent Kit development, system contracts, native services (JS SDK), hackathon tooling, and dev workflow intelligence

plugins.name: hackathon-helper

plugins.name: dev-intelligence
